name: Furry Sniper
short_description: Your mission is tough: eliminate 30 furries scattered across a vast woodland. As an elite sniper, you’ll need precision, patience, and perseverance to track them down and complete your task.
detailed_description:
Take on the role of an elite sniper on a crucial mission: track down and eliminate rogue furries causing chaos in a vast forest. From your lookout tower, you need to find and neutralize all 30 targets. Use bullet-time cameras to see every precise shot up close. Some targets are skilled at hiding, so you’ll need sharp eyes and keen instincts.

Practice your shooting in the Aim Trainer mode, where you’ll find various tools to refine your skills. Compete for top scores with randomly generated targets, ensuring that every session is a new challenge.

In game leaderboards as well as frequent updates, Horde mode was just added and more game modes will come in the future as well! Join the discord and let me know what you want to see added.
